title: Salesforce Task
description: Represents a business activity such as making a phone call or other to-do items. Tasks can be associated with leads, accounts, contacts, opportunities, and other records. In the user interface, Task and Event records are collectively referred to as activities.

WhoId.description: The ID of a related Contact or Lead

WhatId.description: The ID of a related Account, Opportunity, Campaign, Case, or custom object

IsHighPriority.description: Indicates whether the task is high priority

OwnerId.description: ID of the user or queue that owns the task

Description.description: Contains a text description of the task

IsDeleted.description: Indicates whether the record has been moved to the Recycle Bin

AccountId.description: Represents the ID of the related Account

IsClosed.description: Indicates whether the task has been completed

CreatedDate.description: Date and time when this record was created

CreatedById.description: ID of the user who created this record

LastModifiedDate.description: Date and time when this record was last modified

LastModifiedById.description: ID of the user who last modified this record

IsArchived.description: Indicates whether the task has been archived

CallDurationInSeconds.description: Duration of the call in seconds, if this task is a call

ReminderDateTime.description: Date and time to show a reminder

IsReminderSet.description: Indicates whether a reminder is set for this task

RecurrenceActivityId.description: The recurrence activity ID for the recurring series

IsRecurrence.description: Indicates whether the task is set to recur

CompletedDateTime.description: Date and time the task was completed
